data.title: As a Java developer, running onboarding pre-fills commands.* with Java-appropriate defaults including wrapper detection
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Add a Java branch to onboarding SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2b that writes commands.test_runner, commands.lint, commands.format, and commands.format_check based on Maven vs. Gradle detection with wrapper preference. Wrapper detection is root-only: mvnw present → ./mvnw test; pom.xml without mvnw → mvn test; gradlew present → ./gradlew test; build.gradle without gradlew → gradle test.

**Why**: Java projects fall through onboarding with empty commands.* keys today. Without Maven/Gradle defaults, no CI gates, no lint, and no format enforcement are possible.

**Scope**:
- IN: onboarding SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2b Java branch; wrapper detection (root-only file presence check); commands.test_runner routing (mvnw/mvn/gradlew/gradle); commands.lint = mvn checkstyle:check (Maven) / gradlew checkstyle (Gradle); commands.format_check = mvn spotless:check / gradlew spotlessCheck; commands.format = mvn spotless:apply / gradlew spotlessApply
- OUT: detect-stack.sh changes (Story F1); gate-2d/gate-2b extensions (Story F3); project-detect.sh (Story F4); stretch SCs (F5, F6)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, running onboarding on a Maven project with mvnw at root produces a dso-config.conf where commands.test_runner = './mvnw test'
  ← Satisfies: "mvnw present → ./mvnw test"
- When this story is complete, running onboarding on a Maven project without mvnw at root produces commands.test_runner = 'mvn test'
  ← Satisfies: "pom.xml without mvnw → mvn test"; also satisfies SC8 validation grep
- When this story is complete, running onboarding on a Gradle project with gradlew at root produces commands.test_runner = './gradlew test'
  ← Satisfies: "gradlew present → ./gradlew test"
- When this story is complete, running onboarding on a Gradle project without gradlew at root produces commands.test_runner = 'gradle test'
  ← Satisfies: "build.gradle without gradlew → gradle test"
- When this story is complete, commands.lint = 'mvn checkstyle:check', commands.format_check = 'mvn spotless:check', commands.format = 'mvn spotless:apply' are written for Maven; equivalent Gradle commands for Gradle
  ← Satisfies: SC3 Java lint/format defaults
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all 4 wrapper detection cases (mvnw, no-mvnw, gradlew, no-gradlew) and the commands.* values written in each case

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Wrapper detection is root-only — only check for mvnw/gradlew at the repository root (not in subdirectories)
- [Reliability] Story F2 depends on Story F1 (detect-stack.sh must return java-maven/java-gradle before onboarding can branch on Java stack value)
- [Testing] Use fixture directories with appropriate root files (pom.xml, mvnw, build.gradle, gradlew) to simulate Maven/Gradle projects

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
